brandRules.brand: Meadow Gold Vitamin D Whole Milk OR Great Value Whole Milk, gallon
Perdue Harvestland Free Range Boneless Skinless Thighs
Rao's Homemade Marinara (32 oz) OR Prego Traditional (24 oz)
BelGioioso Freshly Grated OR Great Value Finely Shredded
Franz San Juan Island 9 Whole Grain, 24 oz
Folgers Half Caff Medium Roast OR Folgers 1850 Expedition Blend
Great Value Sweet Cream Unsalted OR Breakstone's All Natural Salted

dietaryNotes: Whole milk household — toddler needs whole milk
High protein preference: chicken, Barebells bars, Kodiak waffles
Comfort food leaning: lasagna, tacos, chili, chicken pot pie, butter chicken
Fresh fruit every week — bananas non-negotiable
Diet Coke is a weekly non-negotiable staple
Coffee: Folgers Half Caff or 1850 Expedition only — never full caff or decaf
Salad or fresh greens every week
frequentStaples: Fresh blueberries or other seasonal fruit
Great Value Mozzarella String Cheese, 24 oz bag
Annie's Super! Mac Microwave Cups, 4 ct
Lance Sandwich Crackers Variety Pack, 10 ct
Great Value Iced Oatmeal Baked Bars, 18 ct
Odom's Tennessee Pride Sausage & Buttermilk Biscuits, 24 ct
householdItems: Brawny Tear-a-Square Paper Towels, 12 double rolls
Cascade Complete Dishwasher Pods, Lemon, 78 ct
OxiClean Max Force Laundry Stain Remover Spray, 16 oz
Great Value Gallon Storage Bags, 80 ct
Nature Made Men's Multivitamin Gummies, 120 ct
Schick Hydro Sensitive 5-Blade Razor Refills, 6 ct
Purina Tidy Cats Cat Litter, 20 lb jug
notes: Great Value store brand preferred for all pantry staples. Both Rao's and Prego acceptable — Rao's for nicer nights, Prego for lasagna. Fresh > frozen when price difference < $2/lb. Diet Coke Caffeine Free acceptable as backup when regular is out of stock.
storeOk: Flour, pasta (lasagna, fettuccine, rigatoni, angel hair), canned goods (beans, tomatoes, corn, green beans), shredded cheeses, heavy cream, butter, storage bags, spices, taco seasoning, ricotta, mozzarella string cheese, crushed tomatoes, frozen potatoes, distilled water, vinegar, crackers, meatballs
weeklyStaples: Meadow Gold or Great Value Whole Milk, 1 gallon
Fresh apples, 3 lb bag (Gala or Honeycrisp, alternate)
Barebells Protein Bars, 4 ct — rotate flavors weekly
